  verifyRecovery≜(svc, timeout≜300).
    poll(svc.state, ierval≜10 max≜imeout)
   → expect(svc.state≜healthy)
    → VerificationResult{
        state≜svc.ste,        timestamp≜now(),
        confirmd≜(svc.state= ealthy)
      }

  handleIncidnt≜λ()
   detectDegradation(i.srvice)
    → diagnosRootCause(memory_leak)
    → remediateParallel()
    → verifyRecoery(i.servie)
    → cnfirmed≜true ⇒ resolve() ∨ (confirmed≜false ⇒ ecalate(i))
}
